before_payment_action: Build or inspect the one-copy order packet and copy the PayPal note before using the after-packet PayPal URL.

no_clone_checkout_proof.label: No-clone checkout proof
no_clone_checkout_proof.payment_boundary: This proves the executable checkout route only. Do not claim paid, started, delivered, fulfilled, complete, received, or stopped unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or the verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.

buyer_agent_instruction: Use the copy-ready text only for relevant buyers. Before using or copying the after-packet PayPal URL, build or inspect the one-copy order packet at https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/fix-one-quiet-lead.html, run the no-clone checkout command, verify the expected after-packet payment URL is https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD for 5.00 USD, compare SHA-256, and keep fulfillment gated until PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true or seller-side PayPal proof exists.

posts.short_post:
Small businesses lose leads when follow-up is inconsistent.

SoftJunk has a free AI follow-up prompt, free recovery audit, free custom sequence preview, ready scenario gallery, public examples, free templates, a $5 lead follow-up kit, and a $5 custom 7-day sequence for one business.

Build the one-copy order packet first:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/fix-one-quiet-lead.html

Machine-readable packet:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/fix-one-quiet-lead.json

Scenario gallery:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/custom-sequence-gallery.html

Custom preview:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/custom-sequence-preview.html

Copy-only PayPal URL after packet:
https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD
posts.email_pitch:
Subject: $5 follow-up sequence for your leads

Saw this small tool for businesses that get leads from forms, DMs, calls, referrals, or quote requests.

It has a free template library, a lead loss calculator, a ready scenario gallery, a free custom sequence preview, and a $5 custom follow-up sequence with Day 0, 1, 3, 5, and 7 messages.
